/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/AUDIO-THREADS.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AUDIO-THREADS.dir/src/AudioEngine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AUDIO-THREADS.dir/src/AudioSetup.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AUDIO-THREADS.dir/src/UIManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AUDIO-THREADS.dir/src/Visualizador.cpp.o" -o AUDIO-THREADS  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/arthurcavalcanti/Documents/dev/audio-threads/build/_deps/rtaudio-build _deps/rtaudio-build/librtaudio.7.0.0.dylib -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation
